description: Wastewater Data Health V1 QA rules for staged gravity mains and manholes.

rules.name: Missing manhole asset ID
rules.description: Manhole has no mapped asset identifier.
rules.detection_method: Blank check on mapped manhole asset ID field.
rules.limitation: Asset ID mapping is inferred from field metadata and safe aggregate patterns.
rules.recommended_action: Confirm the authoritative manhole ID and populate missing values in a governed edit workflow.

rules.name: Duplicate manhole asset ID
rules.description: Multiple manholes share the same mapped asset identifier.
rules.detection_method: Duplicate check on nonblank mapped manhole asset ID values.
rules.limitation: Candidate duplicates require steward review before confirming.
rules.recommended_action: Review duplicate manhole IDs against source records and assign unique identifiers where appropriate.

rules.name: Missing pipe asset ID
rules.description: Gravity main has no mapped asset identifier.
rules.detection_method: Blank check on mapped pipe asset ID field.
rules.limitation: Asset ID mapping is inferred from field metadata and safe aggregate patterns.
rules.recommended_action: Confirm the authoritative pipe ID and populate missing values in a governed edit workflow.

rules.name: Duplicate pipe asset ID
rules.description: Multiple gravity mains share the same mapped asset identifier.
rules.detection_method: Duplicate check on nonblank mapped pipe asset ID values.
rules.limitation: Candidate duplicates require steward review before confirming.
rules.recommended_action: Review duplicate pipe IDs against source records and assign unique identifiers where appropriate.

rules.name: Missing pipe diameter
rules.description: Gravity main diameter is blank or nonpositive.
rules.detection_method: Blank and numeric validity check on mapped diameter field.
rules.limitation: Diameter units are inferred from source convention and require confirmation.
rules.recommended_action: Populate missing diameter from source records or engineering review.

rules.name: Missing pipe material
rules.description: Gravity main material is blank.
rules.detection_method: Blank check on mapped material field.
rules.limitation: Material codes are not domain-constrained in the staged source.
rules.recommended_action: Populate material from source records or mark as unknown under an approved domain.

rules.name: Missing pipe status
rules.description: Gravity main lifecycle or operating status is blank.
rules.detection_method: Blank check on mapped status field.
rules.limitation: Lifecycle and operational status may share the same source field.
rules.recommended_action: Confirm status values and normalize to an approved status domain.

rules.name: Invalid or implausible pipe diameter
rules.description: Gravity main diameter is zero, negative, nonnumeric, or outside expected wastewater pipe limits.
rules.detection_method: Numeric range check on mapped diameter field.
rules.limitation: Thresholds are QA screening values, not design criteria.
rules.recommended_action: Verify diameter from source documents and correct invalid values through governed editing.

rules.name: Missing manhole status
rules.description: Manhole status is blank.
rules.detection_method: Blank check on mapped manhole status field.
rules.limitation: Lifecycle and operational status may share the same source field.
rules.recommended_action: Confirm status values and normalize to an approved status domain.

rules.name: Missing installation date
rules.description: Mapped installation year/date is blank or unavailable.
rules.detection_method: Blank and placeholder check on mapped installation date/year field.
rules.limitation: Some staged fields contain year-like values rather than true dates.
rules.recommended_action: Backfill installation date or year from as-builts or project records where authorized.

rules.name: Invalid domain-coded value
rules.description: A coded field value is not present in its source domain.
rules.detection_method: Compare field values to ArcGIS coded-value domains.
rules.limitation: Skipped when staged fields have no domains.
rules.recommended_action: Normalize invalid coded values to the approved domain.

rules.name: Conflicting lifecycle and operational status
rules.description: Lifecycle and operational statuses conflict.
rules.detection_method: Compare mapped lifecycle and operational status values.
rules.limitation: Skipped when both semantics are represented by the same source field.
rules.recommended_action: Confirm intended status model and correct conflicting status values.

rules.name: Null or empty geometry
rules.description: Feature has no usable geometry.
rules.detection_method: ArcPy geometry presence and emptiness check.
rules.limitation: Does not repair or infer missing geometry.
rules.recommended_action: Recreate geometry from authoritative source material.

rules.name: Invalid geometry
rules.description: Feature geometry appears invalid or unusable.
rules.detection_method: Basic geometry validity checks from extracted ArcPy geometry.
rules.limitation: Full Esri geometry validation may require separate geoprocessing review.
rules.recommended_action: Review geometry in GIS and repair only through an approved edit workflow.

rules.name: Very short pipe segment
rules.description: Gravity main length is below the configured short-segment threshold.
rules.detection_method: Geometry length compared to unit-converted threshold.
rules.limitation: Short segments can be valid fittings or representation artifacts.
rules.recommended_action: Review short segment against source geometry and asset model.

rules.name: Potential duplicate pipe geometry
rules.description: Gravity main geometry matches another gravity main candidate.
rules.detection_method: Rounded geometry coordinate signature comparison.
rules.limitation: Reported as candidate duplicates, not confirmed duplicates.
rules.recommended_action: Review candidate duplicate pipe geometries before editing.

rules.name: Potential duplicate manhole geometry
rules.description: Manhole point geometry matches another manhole candidate.
rules.detection_method: Rounded point coordinate signature comparison.
rules.limitation: Reported as candidate duplicates, not confirmed duplicates.
rules.recommended_action: Review candidate duplicate manhole geometries before editing.

rules.name: Unexpected multipart geometry
rules.description: Feature geometry is multipart where a single asset part is expected.
rules.detection_method: Multipart flag from ArcPy geometry extraction.
rules.limitation: Multipart assets may be intentional in legacy source data.
rules.recommended_action: Review multipart geometry and split only if the asset model requires it.

rules.name: Pipe self-intersection or geometry anomaly
rules.description: Gravity main geometry has a screening anomaly such as repeated vertices or closed-line behavior.
rules.detection_method: Coordinate-level anomaly screening.
rules.limitation: Not a substitute for authoritative geometry validation.
rules.recommended_action: Review anomalous pipe geometry in GIS.

rules.name: Pipe endpoint lacks nearby manhole
rules.description: Pipe endpoint is not matched to a manhole within endpoint tolerance.
rules.detection_method: Nearest manhole distance from each pipe endpoint.
rules.limitation: Proximity does not prove authoritative connectivity.
rules.recommended_action: Review endpoint and nearby manhole geometry; do not snap automatically.

rules.name: Manhole lacks nearby pipe endpoint
rules.description: Manhole has no pipe endpoint within endpoint tolerance.
rules.detection_method: Endpoint count within tolerance around each manhole.
rules.limitation: Some manholes may be intentionally isolated or missing associated assets.
rules.recommended_action: Review isolated manholes against source drawings and asset records.

rules.name: Pipe endpoint gap exceeds warning tolerance
rules.description: Pipe endpoint is farther than warning tolerance from the nearest manhole.
rules.detection_method: Nearest manhole distance from each pipe endpoint.
rules.limitation: Source geometry may not be snapped.
rules.recommended_action: Prioritize large endpoint gaps for spatial QA review.

rules.name: Pipe crossing without nearby manhole
rules.description: Pipe geometries cross without a nearby manhole candidate.
rules.detection_method: Candidate segment intersection screening with nearby manhole check.
rules.limitation: Crossings do not automatically mean network connectivity.
rules.recommended_action: Review crossing candidate and source drawings before adding structures.

rules.name: Disconnected wastewater network component
rules.description: Pipe/manhole proximity graph has multiple connected components.
rules.detection_method: Union-find graph built from pipe endpoints and nearby manholes.
rules.limitation: This is proximity-based connectivity, not authoritative topology.
rules.recommended_action: Review disconnected components against system boundaries and missing source layers.

rules.name: Isolated pipe segment
rules.description: Pipe is in a one-pipe component or has no matched endpoint.
rules.detection_method: Pipe component and endpoint-match analysis.
rules.limitation: Force mains, services, and facilities are not yet included.
rules.recommended_action: Review isolated pipe segment against missing network context.

rules.name: Isolated manhole
rules.description: Manhole has no matched pipe endpoint.
rules.detection_method: Manhole endpoint degree from proximity graph.
rules.limitation: Some manholes may be valid stand-alone structures or require missing assets.
rules.recommended_action: Review isolated manhole against source drawings and project records.

rules.name: Manhole associated with an unusually high number of pipe endpoints
rules.description: Manhole has endpoint degree above configured threshold.
rules.detection_method: Endpoint degree count from proximity graph.
rules.limitation: Large junction structures may be valid.
rules.recommended_action: Review high-degree manholes for stacked endpoints or missing structure modeling.

rules.name: Pipe appears to flow uphill based on mapped upstream and downstream invert fields
rules.description: Upstream invert is lower than downstream invert.
rules.detection_method: Compare mapped upstream and downstream invert values.
rules.limitation: Does not infer authoritative flow direction from digitized geometry.
rules.recommended_action: Verify invert values and pipe direction against authoritative source records.

rules.name: Missing upstream invert
rules.description: Mapped upstream invert is blank or zero placeholder.
rules.detection_method: Blank and placeholder check on upstream invert field.
rules.limitation: Zero values may be placeholders in this source.
rules.recommended_action: Populate upstream invert from source records where authorized.

rules.name: Missing downstream invert
rules.description: Mapped downstream invert is blank or zero placeholder.
rules.detection_method: Blank and placeholder check on downstream invert field.
rules.limitation: Zero values may be placeholders in this source.
rules.recommended_action: Populate downstream invert from source records where authorized.

rules.name: Zero or implausible slope
rules.description: Calculated pipe slope is zero, negative, or implausibly steep.
rules.detection_method: Slope calculated from mapped invert difference and pipe length.
rules.limitation: Length and elevation units are assumed compatible after source review.
rules.recommended_action: Verify slope, invert fields, and pipe direction.

rules.name: Pipe slope conflicts with invert difference and length
rules.description: Mapped slope conflicts with calculated slope.
rules.detection_method: Compare mapped slope to calculated slope.
rules.limitation: Skipped when no reliable source slope field exists.
rules.recommended_action: Verify slope calculation and source slope field.
